description: MCP bridge to a live Skia Studio tab: AGSL/SkSL shader authoring, graph editing, screenshots.
name: io.github.lixiaolin94/skia-studio

environmentVariables.description: Override the local ws bridge port (default 8787; pair with the web app ?bridgePort= param).
environmentVariables.name: SKIA_STUDIO_BRIDGE_PORT

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated extra hostnames appended to the WebSocket Origin allowlist.
environmentVariables.name: SKIA_STUDIO_EXTRA_ORIGINS

environmentVariables.description: Override the app URL suggested when no browser tab is connected.
environmentVariables.name: SKIA_STUDIO_APP_URL
